title: Add auto-approval policy for repeated safe patterns
goal: 사용자가 한 번 승인한 tool+params 패턴을 기억하여 동일 패턴 재요청 시 자동 승인한다. 자동 승인된 패턴 목록을 관리하는 API를 추가한다. 위험 레벨 high는 항상 수동 승인을 유지한다.

test_requirements.case: First medium-risk request requires manual approval
After approval, record_approved_pattern stores the pattern
test_requirements.expected: pattern stored in config_store with tool name and param hash

test_requirements.case: Same tool+params pattern auto-approved on second request
Different params for same tool still requires approval

test_requirements.expected: task always becomes approval_required regardless of history

test_requirements.case: GET /approvals/auto returns list of auto-approved patterns
test_requirements.expected: returns list with tool, pattern_hash, approved_at, count
pattern removed, next request requires manual approval again

test_requirements.case: Low risk never requires approval (unchanged behavior)

constraints: Do not change low-risk behavior (always auto-execute)
Do not auto-approve high risk (always manual)
Only medium risk gets auto-approval after first manual approval
Pattern matching uses tool name + sorted JSON hash of params (not exact match)
Auto-approval patterns stored in config_store under 'auto_approval_patterns'
Do not modify intent router or risk evaluator
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
